name: Amtrak ALC-42 Pack
short: The newest Amtrak locomotive to-date, the ALC-42 makes its debut into Train Simulator Classic.
description: The ALC-42 is a highly-detailed model built by Anton Wigovsky. It comes in Day One, Phase VI, Phase VII, America 250 and Freedom 250 variations. It's built with basic functionality, including brakes, a reverser, throttle and headlights. Special features include a working engine room light and a proper ditchlight pattern, true to life.
